message:
refactor(platform): replace async-io and async-channel with promise and flume

toast-notification: Replace async-io::block_on with promise::spawn::block_on
in the DBus notification thread. Remove async-io dep, add promise dep.

window (Wayland): Replace async-channel with flume for the first-configure
synchronization channel, as flume provides the same bounded channel semantics
without pulling in the async-io ecosystem. Update Sender type and use
recv_async() for the await-side. Remove async-channel and async-io deps.

This continues the effort to decouple frankenterm's platform layer from
smol/async-io so the asupersync runtime backend works transparently.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -10,10 +10,10 @@ publish = false
 
 [dependencies]
 log.workspace = true
+promise.workspace = true
 wezterm-open-url.workspace = true
 
 [target.'cfg(all(not(windows), not(target_os="macos")))'.dependencies]
-async-io.workspace = true
 futures-util.workspace = true
 serde = {workspace=true, features = ["derive"]}
 zbus.workspace = true

@@ -21,8 +21,6 @@ gl_generator.workspace = true
 wayland = ["wayland-client", "smithay-client-toolkit", "wayland-egl", "wayland-protocols", "wayland-backend", "wayland-protocols-plasma"]
 
 [dependencies]
-async-channel.workspace = true
-async-io.workspace = true
 async-task.workspace = true
 async-trait.workspace = true
 anyhow.workspace = true
@@ -32,6 +30,7 @@ downcast-rs.workspace = true
 thiserror.workspace = true
 bitflags.workspace = true
 euclid.workspace = true
+flume.workspace = true
 guillotiere.workspace = true
 lazy_static.workspace = true
 libloading.workspace = true
